name: F-Class Kitchen Fire Extinguisher — SS Finish, 6 Litre
shortDescription: Wet chemical extinguisher for commercial kitchen deep-fat fryer and cooking-oil fires.
longDescription: Cooking oil and fat fires (Class F) burn hotter than ordinary Class A/B fires and can splash violently if hit with the wrong agent. This wet chemical unit — a mixture of potassium acetate, citrate or carbonate — is designed to deliver a broad, dispersed, low-velocity discharge specifically so it doesn't cause hot oil to splash. The stainless steel body suits open commercial kitchens, and the CE-marked valve and helium leak testing match the rest of the Kanex range.

images.alt: F-Class Kitchen Fire Extinguisher — SS Finish, 6 Litre supplied by Expert Safety Solutions, Vadodara
